# servicenow_css_include (Data Source)

`servicenow_css_include` data source can be used to retrieve information of a single Service Portal CSS include in ServiceNow by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing Service Portal CSS include in ServiceNow by name.
data "servicenow_css_include" "example" {
  name = "my-css-include"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the CSS include.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `scope` (String) Associates a resource to a specific application ID in ServiceNow.
- `source` (String) Source type of the CSS include. Can be 'url' for an external link or 'local' for a service portal style sheet.
- `style_sheet_id` (String) The ID of the service portal style sheet to include.
- `url` (String) URL of the external CSS file when source is set to 'url'.
